name: Cod Casserole Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 1 Block frozen cod fillets (16 oz., unthawed)
1 Pkg. frozen broccoli spears (10 oz., thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare white sauce as package directs.
2. Cut unpeeled red potatoes into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
(If using other potatoes, peel first.)
3. Oil a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish; arrange potato slices on the bottom.
4. Place the frozen fish in the center of the dish.
5. Spoon all but 1/4 cup white sauce over the potatoes and fish.
6. Cover the dish with foil; bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
7. Remove foil and arrange broccoli spears around the fish.
8. Spoon the reserved white sauce over the broccoli.
9. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
10. Bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the fish is opaque in the center.
Makes 4 servings.
